channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [NANTA] Nanta Tech Board to meet on May 11 for FY26 Audited Results
item.description:
Nanta Tech Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will hold a meeting on Monday, May 11, 2026. The primary agenda for this meeting is to consider and approve the Audited Standalone Financial Results for the half-year and full financial year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the Board will discuss any other items as deemed necessary. The company also informed that the trading window for dealing in its securities is currently closed for insiders and designated persons, in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The trading window will reopen 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 11, 2026.
  • To consider and approve Audited Standalone Financial Results for FY26.
  • Trading window closed for insiders until 48 hours post-results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nanta Tech Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [NILASPACES] Nila Spaces Board to meet May 7 for Q4/FY26 results approval
item.description:
Nila Spaces Ltd. has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on Thursday, May 7, 2026. The primary agenda for this meeting is to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial statements for the financial year ended March 31, 2026, along with the associated auditor and director reports. Additionally, the board will approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the fourth quarter and the full year ended March 31, 2026. In compliance with the company's Code of Conduct for Prohibition of Insider Trading, the trading window close period will conclude 48 hours after the results are publicly disclosed on May 7, 2026.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 7, 2026.
  • To approve audited Q4 and FY26 financial results.
  • Trading window closed until 48 hours post-results release.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nila Spaces Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ATAM] Atam Valves receives API Spec Q1 certification, eyes oil & gas exports
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Atam Valves Limited has been awarded the API Spec Q1, 10th Edition Certificate of Registration by the American Petroleum Institute (API). This certification, Q1-5561, covers the Design, Manufacture, and Supply of Gate, Ball, Check, and Globe Valves for the Petroleum and Natural Gas Industry. This milestone reflects the company's commitment to global quality management systems and marks a transition into a more structured, compliance-driven organization. The certification enhances manufacturing capabilities through advanced CNC machining and robust traceability systems, enabling the company to meet stringent industry requirements. Strategically, it opens new market opportunities with leading oil & gas companies and EPC contractors, particularly in high-growth regions like the Middle East and Africa. It is expected to lead to a margin-accretive product mix, allow development of larger and higher-pressure valves, and expand the WCB valve segment.

  • Received API Spec Q1 certification for oil & gas valves.
  • Certification enables access to global oil & gas markets.
  • Supports shift to higher-margin API-grade product mix.
  • Strengthens manufacturing for critical industry applications.
  • Positions company for export-led growth in Middle East and Africa.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Atam Valves Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [DELTACORP] Delta Corp: SC stays proceedings on tax notices
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Delta Corp Limited and its subsidiary, Highstreet Cruises and Entertainment Private Limited, have received a significant interim relief from the Supreme Court of India. The Hon'ble Supreme Court has ordered a stay on all further proceedings related to the show cause notices issued to the companies for alleged short payment of tax. This stay will remain in effect until the final disposal of the Special Leave Petitions (SLP(C) Nos. 19366-19369/2023) and all other tagged matters. This development provides a temporary reprieve for Delta Corp regarding the substantial tax demands.

  • Supreme Court stayed tax notice proceedings against Delta Corp.
  • Stay is pending final disposal of related SLP matters.
  • Provides temporary relief from significant tax demands.
  • Notices were for alleged short payment of tax.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DELTA CORP LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [CAMPUS] Campus Activewear grants 700,000 ESOPs to one employee at ₹220
item.description:
Campus Activewear Ltd's Nomination and Remuneration Committee, in its meeting on May 1, 2026, approved the grant of 700,000 stock options to a single employee. These options are priced at ₹220 per share and are part of the ESOP 2021 – Vision Pool Scheme. The vesting period is two years with a 50% split. The official grant date for these options is May 2, 2026. This action is in compliance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations 2015.

  • 700,000 stock options granted to one employee.
  • Options priced at ₹220 per share.
  • Granted under ESOP 2021 – Vision Pool Scheme.
  • Vesting period is 2 years with a 50% split.
  • Grant date set for May 2, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Campus Activewear Ltd | Category: ESOP

item.title: [INDRAMEDCO] Indraprastha Medical Board to consider FY26 results & dividend on May 12
item.description:
Indraprastha Medical Corporation Ltd. has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting for Tuesday, May 12, 2026. The agenda includes considering and approving the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. Furthermore, the Board will also discuss and potentially recommend a dividend on the company's equity shares for the financial year 2025-26. This announcement is made in compliance with Regulation 29 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 12, 2026.
  • To approve audited financial results for FY26.
  • To consider and recommend dividend for FY26.
  • Compliance with SEBI Regulation 29.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDRAPRASTHA MEDICAL CORP.LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [GPIL] GPIL Trading Window Closed Until May 17 for Q4 Results & Dividend
item.description:
Godawari Power and Ispat Ltd (GPIL) has announced the closure of its trading window for dealing in company securities for designated persons. The trading window, which commenced closure on April 1, 2026, will now remain closed until May 17, 2026. This closure is effective for 48 hours after the conclusion of the Board of Directors meeting scheduled for May 15, 2026. The purpose of this Board Meeting is to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, and to recommend a final dividend for the financial year 2025-26. The restriction applies to Directors, Key Managerial Personnel (KMP), and other designated employees.

  • GPIL's trading window closed until May 17, 2026.
  • Board meeting on May 15, 2026, to approve Q4/FY26 results.
  • Final dividend for FY2025-26 also to be considered.
  • Closure impacts Directors, KMP, and designated employees.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GODAWARI POWER & ISPAT LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PUNJABCHEM] PCCPL Board Approves Q4/FY26 Results, Recommends ₹3 Dividend
item.description:
Punjab Chemicals & Crop Protection Ltd's Board of Directors, at its meeting on May 1, 2026, approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The statutory auditors issued an unmodified opinion on these financial statements. The Board also recommended a dividend of 30%, equivalent to ₹3 per equity share, for FY26, subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming Annual General Meeting. Additionally, the Board approved the appointment of M/s Khushwinder Kumar & Co as Cost Auditors, M/s S M A M & Co as Internal Auditors, and Mr. Anil Khanna of M/s J.R. Khanna & Company as Tax Auditor for the financial year 2026-27.

  • Board approved Q4/FY26 standalone and consolidated financial results.
  • Statutory auditors issued an unmodified opinion on FY26 financials.
  • Recommended 30% dividend (₹3/share) for FY26, pending AGM approval.
  • Appointed Khushwinder Kumar & Co as Cost Auditors for FY2026-27.
  • Appointed S M A M & Co and J.R. Khanna & Company as Internal and Tax Auditors for FY2026-27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PUNJAB CHEMICALS AND CROP PROTECTION LTD.-$ | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [OROSMITHS] Orosil Smiths to sue Shiprocket over lost shipments & business loss
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Orosil Smiths India Ltd is initiating legal proceedings against Shiprocket Limited before the Hon'ble District Consumer Disputes Redressal Commission (South District), Delhi. The company is seeking claims arising from lost or misplaced shipments, a refund of shipping charges, and compensation for loss of business and goodwill. Additionally, Orosil Smiths is claiming interest and legal expenses related to these issues. This action highlights the company's efforts to recover damages and address operational disruptions caused by the alleged issues with Shiprocket.

  • Orosil Smiths to initiate legal proceedings against Shiprocket Limited.
  • Claims include lost shipments, refund of shipping charges, and business loss.
  • Legal action filed before District Consumer Disputes Redressal Commission.
  • Company seeks compensation for damages, interest, and legal expenses.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: OROSIL SMITHS INDIA LTD.-$ | Category: Legal

item.title: [PUNJABCHEM] Punjab Chemicals Board approves Q4/FY26 results, recommends ₹3 dividend
item.description:
The Board of Directors of Punjab Chemicals & Crop Protection Ltd, at its meeting on May 1, 2026, approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The statutory auditors issued an unmodified opinion on these financial statements. The Board also recommended a dividend of 30%, equivalent to ₹3/- per equity share (on ₹10/- face value shares), subject to approval by members at the upcoming Annual General Meeting. This dividend will be paid/dispatched within 30 days of the AGM. Additionally, the Board approved the appointment of Cost Auditors, Internal Auditors, and a Tax Auditor for FY 2026-27.

  • Board approved audited Q4 and FY26 financial results.
  • Recommended ₹3.00 per share dividend (30%) for FY26.
  • Statutory auditors provided an unmodified opinion on results.
  • Dividend payment is contingent on AGM shareholder approval.
  • New Cost, Internal, and Tax Auditors appointed for FY27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PUNJAB CHEMICALS AND CROP PROTECTION LTD.-$ | Category: Quarterly Result
